title: GPU notebook commits stuck in a long queue (position 264) despite available quota, anyone else right now?
content: Is anyone else seeing very long GPU commit queues today (position in the hundreds)? Is there any known incident/outage?

comments.content: Yes, I experienced the same problem. There's high traffic. Use the other one; it works without any issues.
i am facing same issue with p100 gpu for last 2 days. t4 gpus are working fine.
